enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his fourth day living in Boulder, describing a frustrating errand-filled day repeatedly driving to his mom's house to buy printer ink cartridges one at a time. He spent the prior day printing chapters from 'The Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire' and Google Earth images to decorate his room at a 'crystal level,' and plans to continue that project through the night while drinking.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: frustrated with himself for not buying all cartridges at once, wasted multiple trips
enthusiastic about creating a layered display with printed maps and historical text
surprised that only four days have passed because time has felt very slow

entities: The Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire

transcript.text: Living in Boulder V-LOG for the 4th. BAM! It's only the 4th. That's awesome. Time's going by really slow.
Um, so today, like, I was working, oh, yesterday and last night until like 6 this morning, um, printing up, like, information, like, racer level stuff.
All the, all the, um, decline and fall of the Roman Empire chapters and putting them underneath all of the Google Earth pictures representing the racer level in my room.
I think I want to put a light in there, too, to illuminate it. Um, and then printing pictures, so yeah, I was just busy all day doing that.
Um, today was kind of getting off to a super slow start, because, uh, I got up at like 1, and then, ooh, I, um, I couldn't print anymore, even the black.
So, I had to, it said, I had to go get more ink, but the thing, I was stupid.
The only thing that was blinking was the red.
So, I was like, okay, I'll get the red.
So, when I got the red, I came back, and then when I opened it up, and all, all, all of them are blinking.
So, I was like, fuck, I should have got all of them.
And so, and, but on the way, I also got a lamp, and my mom's house came back.
So, then I went back there, and, uh, I got the three colors, because I was convinced all I needed was three colors.
So, I got those, and I went back to my mom's house, because I forgot to get the lamp shade.
And then, I came back here, and I went in, and I had to get the black, too.
Oh, damn.
So, then I had to go back there, just to get the black.
So, I came back, and I got just the black.
So, I finally got it.
I've been having a hell of a time getting the right cartridges for that.
I wish I knew how much ink it took before I did this, because when I, I did this three times before, and when I did it the other, well, the other, the first two times when I was in Chile,
I had a technique where I had all the colors, and I would just inject more colors into the cartridges, and so it was, like, free to ink, to print my entire room.
It was awesome, but this time I have to buy new cartridges, because I don't have, I didn't even see if they had it.
They probably don't sell the huge containers, just the ink.
So, um, yeah, so, kind of slow.
I finished Medici.
I didn't really watch it, though, I just listened to it while I was working, and then I got started on Borgia.
Um, and, um, and, uh, we're listening to, uh, Rain, and, uh, or watching Rain, and, uh, yeah, so, I'm going to print stuff, put more of the levels up.
I think I'll do, like, a hundred, a hundred of them.
So, and then, um, yeah, print more stuff, and that's what I'll do today, all night, so.
Man, that's a bummer, I had to go out four times today.
It was super, super sketchy.
But I'm glad I'm back home.
Okay, enough talking.
All the details were up here, all the Bare R Story.
So, um, that's, uh, a M-12-10-50.
It was perfect for me.
It was perfect for me, it was perfect for you.
It was perfect for me.
So, I see you guys today.

Next slide.
